metrics.subagent_note: 5 audit agents + 2 fix agents. Metrics include blended M3.5 unblock agent work from same session.

hypotheses.name: 3-phase sprint works across project types
hypotheses.evidence: Security audit/hardening sprint completed in 3-phase workflow. Think phase produced acceptance criteria and wave plan. Execute phase used 5 parallel opus audit agents + serial fix waves. All gates passed first try.

hypotheses.name: Gates catch real issues
hypotheses.evidence: Gates verified 0 regressions from security fixes (390 unit tests, 119 E2E tests pass). npm run check confirmed no new TypeScript errors. Build clean. The security audit itself was the 'gate' — found 2 critical, 9 high vulnerabilities.

hypotheses.name: Skills are followed by agents
hypotheses.evidence: H7 audit: (1) No console.* in client src/ — PASS (only a comment reference found). (2) Coverage >= 75% — PASS (390 tests). (3) Crypto waves serial — PASS (no crypto files modified, audit-only). (4) Acceptance criteria had happy+failure scenarios — PASS. (5) No new UI added — N/A (hardening sprint).
